tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Longer - Dan Fogelberg
----------------------
 
If you enjoyed this, please add it to your favourites and/or
give a rating to show appreciation for the work that went into providing it for you
 
Video Here - https://youtu.be/ImlDHQkPf8Q


[ch]Gmaj7/B[/ch]  - x24032   
[ch]Cadd9[/ch]    - x32033
[ch]Dsus2/F#[/ch] - 2x0230
[ch]D7/A[/ch]     - x00212


[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]Gmaj7/B[/ch]   [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]Gmaj7/B[/ch]   [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]Gmaj7/B[/ch]   [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C/G[/ch]   [ch]D/G[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]                [ch]Gmaj7/B[/ch]       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]Gmaj7/B[/ch]   [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
Longer than there've been fishes in the ocean, higher than any bird ever flew[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]                [ch]Gmaj7/B[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]D7/A[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]D/G[/ch]
Longer than there've been stars up in the heavens, I've been in love with you[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]Gmaj7/B[/ch]       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]Gmaj7/B[/ch]   [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
Stronger than any mountain cath-edral, truer than any tree ever grew[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]Gmaj7/B[/ch]      [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]D7/A[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Deeper than any forest  prim-eval, I am in love with you[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]
I'll bring fire in the winters, you'll send showers in the spring[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Dsus2/F#[/ch]
We'll fly through the falls and summers, with lo - ove on our wings[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Gmaj7/B[/ch]        [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Gmaj7/B[/ch]     [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
Through the years as the fire starts to mellow, blurring lines in the book of our lives[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]                       [ch]Gmaj7/B[/ch]        [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
Though the binding's cracked and the pages start to yellow[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]D7/A[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G/A[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]D7/A[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
I'll be in love with you,        I'll be in love with you[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]D7[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus2/F#[/ch]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]                [ch]Gmaj7/B[/ch]       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]Gmaj7/B[/ch]   [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
Longer than there've been fishes in the ocean, higher than any bird ever flew[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]                [ch]Gmaj7/B[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   
Longer than there've been stars up in the heavens[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]D7/A[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G/A[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]D7/A[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G/A[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]D7/A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
I've been in love with you,        I am in love with you[/tab]
